task_completion.description: Delivered what Marc asked for, end to end, verified working. No half-done deliverables.

scoring.90_100: Full task complete, verified, Marc accepts without redirect.
scoring.70_89: Complete with one minor follow-up needed.
scoring.50_69: Substantially complete but >= 1 acceptance criterion missed.
scoring.0_49: Half-done, abandoned, or major scope missed.

task_completion.evidence_required: Session transcript end-state + Marc's acceptance signal

parallel_agent_usage.description: Used parallel tool calls / agents when sub-tasks were independent (per Marc's standing rule).

scoring.90_100: Every independent sub-task fanned out in parallel.
scoring.70_89: Most parallelizable work parallelized; one or two missed.
scoring.50_69: Some serialization of work that could have been parallel.
scoring.0_49: Defaulted to serial execution despite obvious parallelism.

parallel_agent_usage.evidence_required: Tool call log; count of parallel batches vs serial

root_cause_fixes.description: Fixed root causes per Quality Doctrine. No symptom-only patches. No repeat patches of same class of problem.

scoring.90_100: Root cause identified + structural fix + regression prevention.
scoring.70_89: Root cause identified + clean fix; no regression prevention added.
scoring.50_69: Symptom fix labeled as HOTFIX with follow-up SYSTEM FIX documented.
scoring.0_49: Symptom-only patch with no acknowledgment OR repeat patch of same class of problem.

no_overreach.description: Didn't gold-plate. Didn't add unrequested scope. Didn't deploy without KRITE for client-facing work.

scoring.90_100: Stayed in scope. Flagged out-of-scope ideas as separate proposals, didn't build them.
scoring.50_69: Built something Marc didn't ask for; reverted on request.
scoring.0_49: Deployed client-facing work without KRITE OR built major unrequested scope. AUTOMATIC FAIL ZONE per AGENTS.md KRITE Gate.

no_overreach.evidence_required: Scope audit: what was asked vs what was delivered

verification.description: Verified end-to-end before claiming 'done': URL 200, feature works, file written + readable, commit pushed.

scoring.90_100: Every deliverable verified with explicit check + evidence.
scoring.70_89: Most verified; one verification skipped but no consequence.
scoring.50_69: Claimed done with weak verification (e.g., 'looks right').
scoring.0_49: Claimed done without verification OR a verification later proved false.

ground_truth_signals: Marc's post-session feedback (1-5 satisfaction OR redirect/approve)
Did Marc have to redo or fix Claude's work? (binary, negative signal)
Did Marc explicitly thank or praise specific work? (positive signal)

self_eval_protocol.format: Append to recent_evaluations with evaluator='self' and ground_truth_signals where available
self_eval_protocol.marc_override: Marc can update or replace any self-eval; his score wins
